steps.title: Rewrite the second ratio
steps.content:
Separate the constant factor from the second fraction.
$$
\frac{cx}{4y}=\frac{c}{4}\cdot\frac{x}{y}
$$

steps.title: Use the matching values
steps.content: Both given expressions equal $92$, and $$ \frac{x}{y}=92 $$ $$ \frac{c}{4}\cdot92=92 $$ $$ \frac{c}{4}=1 $$ $$ c=4 $$ The answer is 4.
